personal.preferred_title: Lead Capacity Management / Observability Analytics Engineer

summary: Lead Capacity Management and Observability Analytics Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across infrastructure capacity forecasting, telemetry analytics, performance engineering, Python automation, and regulated financial-services environments. Deep hands-on background with BMC TrueSight/TSCO, Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, AppDynamics, CA APM, time-series forecasting with Prophet/scikit-learn, capacity risk analysis, operational reporting, and executive-facing recommendations. Strong newer experience with AI-assisted development, RAG-style workflows, and agentic automation pipelines.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Led capacity analytics and forecasting work for enterprise infrastructure, transforming telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for risk analysis, capacity planning, and leadership reporting.
Built Python, Pandas, SQL, and PySpark-oriented pipelines to ingest and normalize performance/capacity data from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Wily, AppDynamics, and infrastructure sources.
Developed time-series forecasting models using Prophet and scikit-learn to identify potential capacity bottlenecks months ahead and support upgrade, downgrade, and remediation decisions.
Created analytical models and operational reports that identified infrastructure hotspots, underutilized systems, and capacity risks across banking technology environments.
Built automation for recurring capacity reporting, data validation, reconciliation, exception handling, and production support workflows, reducing manual reporting effort and improving repeatability.
Designed Oracle-backed historical retention structures and reporting tables to support large-scale time-series telemetry analysis and infrastructure risk visibility.
Produced executive-facing dashboards, reports, and narratives using Python visualization libraries and Streamlit-style reporting to communicate technical findings to varied audiences.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, operations, and management teams to gather capacity requirements, explain forecasting outputs, and recommend practical remediation options.
Applied regulated banking controls, operational runbooks, documentation, monitoring, and support practices to maintain reliable and auditable capacity analytics workflows.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, improving visibility into web and mobile performance.
Implemented End User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing to expose user-experience issues, application dependencies, and performance bottlenecks.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance telemetry to surface optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance engineering decisions.
Participated in AWS migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness and operational visibility requirements.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a regulated financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, management modules, and reporting standards adopted across enterprise monitoring environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven extraction scripts that automated recurring telemetry reporting and replaced manual weekly exports.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, transaction traces, and production evidence.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and knowledge-sharing materials for monitoring operations and application teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Optimized high-throughput transaction systems by analyzing database and application performance, tuning SQL/database access patterns, and improving system efficiency.
Led migration of a high-volume shopping-engine data platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to Oracle RAC while preserving correctness and performance expectations.
Built validation utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Capacity Management: Capacity forecasting, infrastructure risk analysis, hotspot detection, upgrade/downgrade recommendations, performance trend analysis, capacity models, resource optimization
skills.Observability / APM: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, AppDynamics, CA APM / Introscope, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds
skills.Analytics & Forecasting: Time-series forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, statistical analysis, trend analysis, anomaly detection concepts, operational analytics, executive reporting, modeling recommendations
skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, Java, C, C++, XML, JSON, YAML
skills.Data Engineering: Telemetry pipelines, ETL/ELT, data ingestion, normalization concepts, data validation, reconciliation, data quality checks, reporting datasets, schema design, operational data models
skills.Visualization & Reporting: Streamlit, Plotly, matplotlib, seaborn, operational dashboards, executive reports, Tableau/Grafana transferable concepts, technical and non-technical presentations
skills.Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Linux/Unix, virtualized infrastructure concepts, Kubernetes/PCF awareness
skills.AI / Automation: AI-assisted development, Claude Code, Copilot-style workflows, Grok/xAI API, RAG concepts, FAISS, sentence-transformers, agentic workflow automation, LangChain/LangGraph awareness
skills.Financial Services: Regulated banking environments, investment/corporate banking technology exposure, operational controls, auditability, risk-aware decision-making, production support
skills.Delivery: Git/GitHub workflows, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, technical documentation, runbooks, stakeholder collaboration, knowledge sharing, mentoring, incident support

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a capacity forecasting platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into curated datasets, Prophet/scikit-learn forecasts, capacity-risk indicators, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for proactive resource planning.

projects.name: Observability and APM Telemetry Analytics
projects.description: Built and supported monitoring dashboards, telemetry extraction scripts, transaction tracing workflows, alert thresholds, and operational reports across Dynatrace, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics environments.

projects.name: AI-Assisted Job Search and Data Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python automation workflow using LLM APIs, RAG-style semantic similarity, JSON artifacts, quality gates, and agentic orchestration to automate scoring, tailoring, document generation, and tracking.
